metadata.name: Draw Funds from a Line of Credit

description: A corporate client needs to draw $100,000 from their commercial line of credit to cover a temporary cash shortfall.

nodes.task_description: Verify the requestor is an authorized user on the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the user's identity and authority to draw funds.

nodes.task_description: Check the available balance on the line of credit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there is sufficient availability for the $100,000 draw.

nodes.task_description: Process the draw and transfer the funds to the company's operating account.
